tool.name: getorf
tool.summary: Extract stop-bounded forward ORFs from nucleotide sequences

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: `getorf` is part of the exposed EMBOSS-RS `translation_tools` cohort. This page is a generated baseline documentation stub produced through the governed autodoc path so the shipped tool surface remains fully documented even where richer harvested narrative or executable examples are still pending.

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content: This tool accepts coding-sequence or protein-oriented inputs through the shared sequence IO and typed parameter layers used by the translation and codon-analysis cohort.

sections.title: Outputs
sections.content: The current implementation emits structured comparison rows, codon profiles, or transformed sequence records through the shared result layer.

sections.title: Current Status
sections.content: This method is implemented and exposed through `emboss-rs getorf`. The generated tool page and the machine-readable validation stub at [`../validation/getorf.validation.json`](../validation/getorf.validation.json) are current. No richer autodoc examples are declared in this contract yet; future prompts should replace or extend this stub with harvested or executable evidence rather than hand-maintaining the generated page directly.

sections.title: Caveats
sections.content: Baseline stub coverage documents the exposed command surface and links to available validation evidence, but it does not imply that all historical EMBOSS examples, rendered screenshots, or legacy comparisons have been captured yet.
